mapper.sql: CASE WHEN ls.sync_time IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ei.leave_date IS NULL THEN ls.sync_status WHEN CONVERT(DATE, ls.sync_time) < CONVERT(DATE, ei.leave_date) THEN 0 ELSE ls.sync_status END

FROM employee_information ei LEFT JOIN ihr_employee_leaving_status ls ON ei.id = ls.employee_id
ei.leave_date IS NOT NULL
AND CONVERT(DATE, ei.leave_date) BETWEEN CONVERT(DATE, #{startDate}) AND CONVERT(DATE, #{endDate})
AND ei.staff_name LIKE '%' + #{staffName} + '%'
AND ei.staff_no LIKE '%' + #{staffNo} + '%'
AND = #{syncStatus}
AND ei.staff_no NOT IN
#{sno}
mapper.select:
SELECT ei.id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo, ei.mobile_no AS mobileNo, ei.department_name AS departmentName, ei.leave_date AS leaveDate, ei.staff_status AS staffStatus, AS syncStatus, ls.sync_time AS syncTime, ls.error_message AS errorMessage
ORDER BY ei.leave_date DESC, ei.staff_name OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: MERGE ihr_employee_leaving_status AS target USING (SELECT #{entity.employeeId} AS employee_id) AS source ON target.employee_id = source.employee_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET staff_name = #{entity.staffName}, staff_no = #{entity.staffNo}, sync_status = #{entity.syncStatus}, sync_time = #{entity.syncTime}, error_message = #{entity.errorMessage}, update_time = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (employee_id, staff_name, staff_no, sync_status, sync_time, error_message, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{entity.employeeId}, #{entity.staffName}, #{entity.staffNo}, #{entity.syncStatus}, #{entity.syncTime}, #{entity.errorMessage}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
mapper.select: SELECT sync_status FROM ihr_employee_leaving_status WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
